Operation 'accessapproval.organizations.deleteAccessApprovalSettings' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details. Missing summary entirely. Description is clear but lacks explicit mention of required input parameter and return value. Added summary and clarified input requirements and response format for better AI agent understanding of when and how to use this operation.

data.current_description: Deletes the settings associated with a project, folder, or organization. This will have the effect of disabling Access Approval for the project, folder, or organization, but only if all ancestors also have Access Approval disabled. If Access Approval is enabled at a higher level of the hierarchy, then Access Approval will still be enabled at this level as the settings are inherited.
data.summary_suggestion: Delete Access Approval settings for organization
data.description_suggestion: Deletes the Access Approval settings associated with an organization. This disables Access Approval for the organization only if all parent resources (folders/organizations) also have Access Approval disabled. If Access Approval is enabled at a higher level in the hierarchy, it remains enabled at this level due to inheritance. Requires the resource name (name parameter) identifying the organization. Returns an empty response on successful deletion.
data.reasoning: Missing summary entirely. Description is clear but lacks explicit mention of required input parameter and return value. Added summary and clarified input requirements and response format for better AI agent understanding of when and how to use this operation.

data.current_description: Gets an approval request. Returns NOT_FOUND if the request does not exist.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a specific approval request by its resource name. Returns the ApprovalRequest object containing details such as the requester, resource being accessed, justification, and current state. Returns NOT_FOUND error if the approval request does not exist. Requires the approval request resource name (name parameter).
data.reasoning: Missing summary. Description is too brief and lacks input/output details. Added summary and expanded description to specify the ApprovalRequest schema returned, clarify the required name parameter, and improve AI agent understanding of what data will be retrieved.

message: Operation 'accessapproval.organizations.updateAccessApprovalSettings' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Missing summary. Description lacks clarity on inputs (field_mask usage, request body) and outputs. Added summary and expanded description to explain field_mask behavior, specify the request and response schemas, and clarify required parameters for AI agent interpretability.

data.current_description: Updates the settings associated with a project, folder, or organization. Settings to update are determined by the value of field_mask.
data.summary_suggestion: Update Access Approval settings for organization
data.description_suggestion: Updates the Access Approval settings for an organization. Accepts an AccessApprovalSettings object and uses field_mask to determine which settings to update, enabling partial updates. Returns the updated AccessApprovalSettings object. Requires the organization resource name (name parameter) and the AccessApprovalSettings request body with field_mask specifying which fields to modify.
data.reasoning: Missing summary. Description lacks clarity on inputs (field_mask usage, request body) and outputs. Added summary and expanded description to explain field_mask behavior, specify the request and response schemas, and clarify required parameters for AI agent interpretability.

message: Operation 'accessapproval.organizations.approvalRequests.approve' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details. Missing summary. Description lacks input parameter details. Added summary and clarified required inputs (name parameter and ApproveApprovalRequestMessage body) to help AI agents understand what data must be provided to approve a request.

data.current_description: Approves a request and returns the updated ApprovalRequest. Returns NOT_FOUND if the request does not exist. Returns FAILED_PRECONDITION if the request exists but is not in a pending state.
data.description_suggestion: Approves a pending approval request, granting the requested access. Requires the approval request resource name (name parameter) and an ApproveApprovalRequestMessage request body. Returns the updated ApprovalRequest object with approved state. Returns NOT_FOUND if the approval request does not exist. Returns FAILED_PRECONDITION if the request is not in a pending state.
data.reasoning: Missing summary. Description lacks input parameter details. Added summary and clarified required inputs (name parameter and ApproveApprovalRequestMessage body) to help AI agents understand what data must be provided to approve a request.

message: Operation 'accessapproval.organizations.approvalRequests.dismiss' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, not_actionable. Missing summary. Description is unclear about the action's effect and lacks input details. Added summary and restructured description to clarify that dismissal ignores the request (not denying access), specify required inputs, and explain the distinction from denial for better AI agent understanding.

data.current_description: Dismisses a request. Returns the updated ApprovalRequest. NOTE: This does not deny access to the resource if another request has been made and approved. It is equivalent in effect to ignoring the request altogether. Returns NOT_FOUND if the request does not exist. Returns FAILED_PRECONDITION if the request exists but is not in a pending state.
data.description_suggestion: Dismisses a pending approval request without denying access. Requires the approval request resource name (name parameter) and a DismissApprovalRequestMessage request body. Returns the updated ApprovalRequest object with dismissed state. Note: Dismissing does not revoke access if another approval request has been granted. Returns NOT_FOUND if the request does not exist. Returns FAILED_PRECONDITION if the request is not in a pending state.
data.reasoning: Missing summary. Description is unclear about the action's effect and lacks input details. Added summary and restructured description to clarify that dismissal ignores the request (not denying access), specify required inputs, and explain the distinction from denial for better AI agent understanding.

message: Operation 'accessapproval.organizations.approvalRequests.invalidate' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, not_actionable. Missing summary. Description is unclear about the action's effect and lacks input details. Added summary and restructured description to clarify that invalidation revokes an approved access (distinct from dismissal), specify required inputs, and explain the relationship to other approvals for better AI agent understanding.

data.current_description: Invalidates an existing ApprovalRequest. Returns the updated ApprovalRequest. NOTE: This does not deny access to the resource if another request has been made and approved. It only invalidates a single approval. Returns FAILED_PRECONDITION if the request exists but is not in an approved state.
data.description_suggestion: Invalidates a previously approved approval request, revoking the associated approval. Requires the approval request resource name (name parameter) and an InvalidateApprovalRequestMessage request body. Returns the updated ApprovalRequest object with invalidated state. Note: Invalidating only affects this specific approval; access may continue if another approval request has been granted. Returns FAILED_PRECONDITION if the request is not in an approved state.
data.reasoning: Missing summary. Description is unclear about the action's effect and lacks input details. Added summary and restructured description to clarify that invalidation revokes an approved access (distinct from dismissal), specify required inputs, and explain the relationship to other approvals for better AI agent understanding.

data.current_description: Lists approval requests associated with a project, folder, or organization. Approval requests can be filtered by state (pending, active, dismissed). The order is reverse chronological.
data.summary_suggestion: List approval requests for an organization
data.description_suggestion: Lists all approval requests associated with an organization. Supports filtering by state (pending, active, dismissed) and returns results in reverse chronological order. Requires the organization resource name (parent parameter). Returns a ListApprovalRequestsResponse containing an array of ApprovalRequest objects and pagination information. Supports pagination through limit and offset parameters.
data.reasoning: Missing summary. Description lacks output details and pagination information. Added summary and expanded description to specify the response schema (ListApprovalRequestsResponse), clarify pagination support, and explain the parent parameter requirement for AI agent understanding of how to retrieve and paginate through approval requests.
